featured.title: Use agents for long-running and more complex tasks
featured.description: Customize chat with prepackaged agent plugins, let agents drive the browser and validate their own changes, and use agent memory to persist plans and context across long-running sessions.

highlights.title: Multi-agent development
highlights.description: VS Code is your home for multi-agent development. Run multiple AI agent sessions in parallel, across different projects, environments, and agent harnesses.

highlights.title: AI core concepts
highlights.description: Get an overview of the core concepts and how AI agents work in VS Code.

highlights.title: Build and test with browser agent tools
highlights.description: Let AI build web apps and automatically verify them in the integrated browser, catching and fixing bugs on its own.
